_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Multiple brain-derived cells within optic pathway glioma express CXCL12 including endothelial cells (Figure 1A), entrapped axons and infiltrating microglia.
details: Successfully identified CXCL12 expression in multiple brain-derived cells within optic pathway glioma including endothelial cells, entrapped axons and infiltrating microglia
